inputs.label: Value to Round
inputs.businessContext: The input value that needs to be rounded to a specified multiple.

inputs.label: Round to Nearest
inputs.businessContext: The multiple to round to, e.g., 0.5 for half-unit rounding, 5 for nearest 5, etc.

inputs.label: Offset
inputs.businessContext: Optional offset applied before rounding. The value is shifted by this amount, rounded, then shifted back.

inputs.label: Decimal Places in Output
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the rounded output. Ensures precision and readability.
